title: Software Developer
description: Third-year Computer Science student specializing in Application and AI, experienced in full-stack web development, AI applications, backend systems, and data analysis.
experience: Developed a web application for Nestle to manage manufacturing processes, centralizing data and automating tasks using ExpressJS, ReactJS, MongoDB, and Google Cloud. Implemented a CNN-based pipeline for lymphatic vessel tracking in medical videos for biomedical research. Built a microservice-based scheduler application with Go, Python, and SQL, optimizing schedules with genetic algorithms. Conducted coffee price prediction using ensemble machine learning techniques on time-series data.
